## Sprint Reference

<!-- e.g. Sprint 2 — chore/git-branching -->
Sprint ___ — `<branch-name>`

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] Feature/change is in an active sprint plan (`docs/sprints/SPRINT-N.md`)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] Docs updated if endpoints changed (`docs/API.md`, `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
- [ ] Branch will be deleted after merge
